title: New Nagios Core and Observium CE skills are live
summary: Update your linux-admin plugin to get /linux-admin:nagios-core-expert and /linux-admin:observium-ce-expert for community edition monitoring stacks, plugins, SNMP, pollers, discovery, RRD, alerting, and safe config troubleshooting.
highlights: New /linux-admin:nagios-core-expert for Nagios Core community edition object configs, plugins, NRPE/NCPA/passive checks, notifications, CGI, and safe config verification.
New /linux-admin:observium-ce-expert for Observium Community Edition SNMP onboarding, add_device.php, poller-wrapper, discovery, RRD/rrdcached, cron, database, and web/PHP issues.
Plugin package metadata is aligned to 1.17.31 with 110 expert skills.
